‹ the live network

Drive the network

Connect an identity and fire real cap-gated turns in your browser — publish a minisite, open a metered lease, fire a transfer. Each is built, Ed25519-signed and submitted on the verified rail through the published @dregg/sdk; the resulting cell is verifiable trustlessly in-tab.

loading…
interactive v1 · turns are real cap-gated, Ed25519-signed turns over the published @dregg/sdk — not mocked. Trustless verification is the in-tab light client (the cell cards). On the live edge the faucet/submit may be gated; point at a node with ?api=….
